adjoint: symmetric matrix under normalized Q_ST inner product
claim_boundary: BHSM v5.7 conditionally closes a minimal scalar/topographic profile and boundary-value problem in normalized dimensionless units. It evaluates alpha_scale, beta_scale, and M_BH/M_star for the declared reduced action coefficients, but it does not derive an absolute eV/GeV unit, particle masses, gauge couplings, CKM values, rare-B observables, or full BHSM completion.
domain: two-component homogeneous scalar/topographic reduced subspace with Robin zero-flux boundary data
